9698a5c4bc02f28e.resultTeX: \frac{m_1^2+m_2^2+m_3^2}{2 \varepsilon^2}+\frac{3 m_1^2+3 m_2^2+3 m_3^2-2 m_1^2 \log \left(m_1^2\right)-2 m_2^2 \log \left(m_2^2\right)-2 m_3^2 \log \left(m_3^2\right)}{2 \varepsilon}+\frac{1}{6} \left(-\frac{3 \left(-4 m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+2 m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) H\left(\frac{1}{1-m_1^2 m_2^{-2}},\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)-4 m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right) H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)+2 m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right) H\left(\frac{1}{1-m_1^2 m_2^{-2}},\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)+\zeta(2) m_1^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)+\zeta(2) m_2^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)+\zeta(2) m_3^2 W_1^- W_1^++m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right) \log ^2\left(-W_1^-\right)+m_1^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right) \log ^2\left(m_1^2 m_2^{-2}\right)+m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \log ^2\left(-W_1^+\right)-m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right) \log ^2\left(m_1^2 m_2^{-2}\right)+m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right) \log ^2\left(m_1^2 m_3^{-2}\right)-2 m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right) \log \left(m_1^2 m_3^{-2}\right) \log \left(-W_1^-\right)-2 m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \log \left(m_1^2 m_3^{-2}\right) \log \left(-W_1^+\right)-\zeta(2) m_3^2 W_1^-+2 \zeta(2) m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right)-\zeta(2) m_3^2 W_1^++2 \zeta(2) m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right)-3 \zeta(2) m_3^2\right)}{\left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)}+6 \left(m_1^2-m_2^2-m_3^2\right) H\left(0,\frac{1}{1-m_1^2 m_2^{-2}}\,;1\right)+\left(12+\pi ^2\right) m_1^2+6 m_1^2+\left(12+\pi ^2\right) m_2^2+6 m_2^2+\left(12+\pi ^2\right) m_3^2+6 m_3^2+3 m_1^2 \left(2 \log ^2\left(m_1^2\right)-2 \log \left(m_1^2\right)+1\right)+3 m_2^2 \left(2 \log ^2\left(m_2^2\right)-2 \log \left(m_2^2\right)+1\right)+3 m_3^2 \left(2 \log ^2\left(m_3^2\right)-2 \log \left(m_3^2\right)+1\right)-12 m_1^2 \log \left(m_1^2\right)-12 m_2^2 \log \left(m_2^2\right)-12 m_3^2 \log \left(m_3^2\right)\right)+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
9698a5c4bc02f28e.normalizedSymbolTeX: \begin{aligned}\varepsilon^{-2}&\colon\;\frac{1}{2} \left(m_1^2+m_2^2+m_3^2\right) \\ \varepsilon^{-1}&\colon\;-m_2^2\,(W_1) - m_3^2\,(W_2) \\ \varepsilon^{0}&\colon\;\frac{1}{\left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)}\!\left[-3 m_2^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)\,(W_1) + m_2^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)\,(W_1 \otimes W_1) - m_1^2 W_1^- W_1^++m_2^2 W_1^- W_1^++m_3^2 W_1^- W_1^++m_1^2 \left(-W_1^-\right)+m_2^2 W_1^--m_1^2 W_1^++m_2^2 W_1^+-m_1^2+m_2^2-m_3^2\,(W_3 \otimes W_1) - 3 m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)\,(W_2) + m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right) \left(W_1^++1\right)\,(W_2 \otimes W_2) + m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right)\,(W_4 \otimes W^+_1) + m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right)\,(W_5 \otimes W^+_1) + m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right)\,(W_5 \otimes W_1) - \left(m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right)\right)\,(W_2 \otimes W^+_1) - \left(m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right)\right)\,(W^+_1 \otimes W_2) - \left(m_3^2 \left(W_1^-+1\right)\right)\,(W^+_1 \otimes W^+_1) + m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right)\,(W_6 \otimes W^-_1) + m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right)\,(W_7 \otimes W^-_1) + m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right)\,(W_7 \otimes W_1) - \left(m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right)\right)\,(W_2 \otimes W^-_1) - \left(m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right)\right)\,(W^-_1 \otimes W_2) - \left(m_3^2 \left(W_1^++1\right)\right)\,(W^-_1 \otimes W^-_1)\right]\end{aligned}
